01 · Solutions

Six domains. One studio.

Pick a discipline. Open it. Each card unfolds into its own world — a deep dive into how we approach the work.

AI & Automation

Intelligent systems that learn, decide, and adapt at production scale.

Open

AI & Automation

Engines that think.

From retrieval-augmented assistants to autonomous decision pipelines, we ship AI that is observable, evaluable, and safe.

  • RAG & agentic systems with tool use
  • Custom evaluation harnesses & guardrails
  • Vector indexes, hybrid retrieval, model routing
  • LLMOps: tracing, cost telemetry, A/B
3.4×throughput vs. baseline
78%cost reduction
p50 420msresponse time

Cloud Infrastructure

Resilient, multi-region platforms with infrastructure-as-code from day one.

Open

Cloud Infrastructure

Platforms that don't blink.

Multi-cloud, multi-region, multi-team. We build the platform substrate before the product team needs to ask.

  • Kubernetes, service mesh, GitOps delivery
  • Terraform / Pulumi — every resource declarative
  • Observability: traces, metrics, structured logs
  • Cost guardrails & capacity planning
99.99%availability
4 minmedian deploy
6 regionsactive-active

Cybersecurity

Threat modeling, zero-trust architecture, and continuous security posture.

Open

Cybersecurity

Defense in depth.

Zero-trust by default. Your perimeter is identity, your traffic is encrypted, your secrets are short-lived.

  • Threat modeling & tabletop exercises
  • SBOM, signed builds, supply-chain hygiene
  • Secrets management with rotation
  • Continuous compliance: SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO
0critical CVEs in prod
<15 minsecret rotation
SOC 2type II ready

Web Platforms

Edge-first architectures with type-safe end-to-end stacks.

Open

Web Platforms

Web that moves.

Performance budgets enforced in CI. Accessibility audits per release. The kind of frontend that hits 100 across the board.

  • React, SvelteKit, Astro — fit-for-purpose
  • Edge runtime & streaming SSR
  • Design systems with Storybook + Chromatic
  • WCAG 2.2 AA, Lighthouse 95+ minimum
97Lighthouse avg
<1.2sLCP at p75
0 a11yblockers shipped

Data Analytics

Pipelines, warehouses, and dashboards that decision-makers actually read.

Open

Data Analytics

Numbers that narrate.

From event capture to executive dashboards. We treat the data layer as a product, not a side-effect.

  • dbt, Airflow, streaming ELT
  • Warehouse modeling & semantic layer
  • Self-serve analytics for non-engineers
  • Forecasting & anomaly detection
<30sdata freshness
500B+events / month
92%self-serve queries

Product Design

Research-led product design that ships with the engineering team, not after.

Open

Product Design

Designed to be used.

Discovery sprints, prototypes that are real code, and design systems that are a single source of truth.

  • Discovery, JTBD, qualitative research
  • Figma → tokens → production parity
  • Motion language and interaction models
  • Brand systems engineered for scale
+38%activation lift
0 → 1brand systems
5×design velocity

02 · Operations

Always-on. Always watching.

Three command centers behind every Zynape platform — engineered to monitor, defend, and scale before you ever notice a wobble.

Cloud · Data Center

Multi-region compute fabric.

Active-active deployments across regions, hot failover, infra-as-code from line one — capacity scales before your traffic does.

  • Multi-cloud + on-prem hybrid topology
  • GitOps continuous delivery, blue/green
  • Sub-minute auto-scaling on demand spikes
  • Carbon-aware workload scheduling
99.999%uptime SLO
< 30sregion failover
6 PoPsactive-active
SOC · Security Ops

Threats caught before they breach.

24/7 detection, response, and forensic trail. We harden the perimeter, watch the inside, and rehearse the worst day.

  • SIEM + SOAR with custom detections
  • Mean-time-to-respond under fifteen minutes
  • Red-team exercises & tabletop drills
  • Compliance: SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA
< 15mMTTR
24/7threat watch
0breaches '23–'25
NOC · Network Ops

Routes that self-heal.

Edge-to-edge visibility, BGP route shaping, and predictive failure detection — your network reroutes before a packet drops.

  • Real-time topology & latency heatmap
  • Anomaly detection on telemetry streams
  • Zero-touch provisioning at every PoP
  • Predictive capacity & congestion forecasts
< 8 msp50 hop
1.2 Tb/speak throughput
180+PoPs reachable

03 · Service

How we work.

Five movements. One arc. Each card flips to reveal what we actually do inside — hover any step to see.

Step 01

Discover

We embed with stakeholders, map jobs-to-be-done, and identify the hottest constraints to break first.

Inside Discover

  • 2-week embedded sprint
  • User & stakeholder interviews
  • Constraint & risk register
  • Solution shape sketch

Step 02

Design

High-fidelity prototypes that engineers can pull tokens from. No throwaway artifacts.

Inside Design

  • Figma libraries → code tokens
  • Motion + interaction prototypes
  • Accessibility annotations
  • Engineering handoff docs

Step 03

Build

Trunk-based, type-safe, observable. We ship in week one and keep shipping.

Inside Build

  • Trunk-based delivery
  • Tests as documentation
  • Observability from line one
  • Daily preview deploys

Step 04

Validate

A/B tests, eval suites, real-user monitoring. We don't celebrate launches — we celebrate impact.

Inside Validate

  • A/B & multi-arm experiments
  • Eval harnesses for AI features
  • RUM, error budgets, SLOs
  • Weekly impact readouts

Step 05

Scale

Hand-off, training, and runbooks. Or stay on retainer — we're flexible.

Inside Scale

  • Runbooks & on-call training
  • Long-term advisory retainers
  • Team upskilling workshops
  • Architecture decision records

04 · Contact

Start a conversation.

Tell us what you're building. We answer every message inside one business day.

Studio

Remote-first · GMT+0 to GMT-8

Response time

< 1 business day
